ɴᴇʀᴅʏ/ᴘʀᴜᴅᴇ ‘ᴜꜱᴇʀ

“I could be your knight in shining armour.” -“I’d get down on my knees for you, doing everything you want.”

↓

CONTEXT

You’re just reading a book, minding your own business, only for your roommate to snatch it out of your hands and tease you about it..

You really can’t tell if she hates or likes you.

-> Read personality for more.
